## Summary

Describe the change and why it helps the project. Reference related issues with `Fixes #123` or `Closes #456` when applicable.

## What changed

- List the key changes in bullet points
- Mention new files, modified files, or deleted files

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` — TypeScript passes
- [ ] `npm run test:unit` — Tests pass
- [ ] `npm run lint` — ESLint passes
- [ ] `npm run format` — Code formatted
- [ ] Manual testing completed when relevant

## Documentation

- [ ] README.md updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] docs/ updated (if behavior or configuration changed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated with a summary of the change

## Screenshots or output

Add screenshots, terminal output, or example payloads when helpful.

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR is focused on one main improvement (not a bundle of unrelated changes)
- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md` and followed the guidelines
- [ ] I did not add secrets, API keys, or private data
- [ ] Branch targets `main` and is up to date

---

### PR Type

- `feat:` — New feature
- `fix:` — Bug fix
- `docs:` — Documentation
- `test:` — Testing
- `refactor:` — Code restructuring
- `chore:` — Maintenance
- `perf:` — Performance
